brief_notes: Strengths: Exceptional statistical density with verbatim chi-squared values (df), Welch's t with fractional df, exact p-values (0.00022, 0.00031), and proportions (169/444, 1581/4928) across 7 well-structured tables; all 4 figures included; methods section is highly detailed with stereotaxic coordinates, viral titers, and imaging parameters. Weaknesses: Table 3 uses directional arrows instead of exact group means for 4 rows (acknowledged in footnote); some training-table p-values are thresholded (<0.05) rather than exact; one citation (sauer2019glm) is a mild thematic mismatch; author field is placeholder. Table audit: PASS -- no bare qualitative cell values (Higher/Lower/Enriched/Increased/Decreased) found in any results table rows.
